name: Abigale, Poet Laureate
macro_plan: Cast noncreature spells to generate a swarm of 1/1 flying Spirits, using them to block, attack, or sacrifice for card advantage. Win by overwhelming opponents with board presence and out-drawing them through spell synergy, particularly against spell-heavy combo and token/artifact archetypes.
tells: Abigale's ability triggers on cast, not on resolution, so it works with instant-speed spells.
Synergizes well with cheap cantrips and removal.
Avoid casting too many spells in a single turn if you can't follow up, as it leaves you vulnerable to wipes.
Common mistake: forgetting to sacrifice Spirits for draw when you're low on resources.
Unique interaction: Sacrificing a Spirit for draw can be done in response to a removal spell to replace it.

predicted_lines.line: Turn 1: Play a land, cast a cheap cantrip or removal to trigger token generation.
Turn 2: Develop board with another land + spell, or play a Scornmage/Administrator to stabilize.
Sequence lands to ensure you can cast your first noncreature spell on curve.
